scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,expo -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.setup:dev: npm run build:shared && node scripts/ensure-backend-env.mjs && node scripts/ensure-mobile-env.mjs && npm run db:prepare -w backend
scripts.quickstart: npm run docker:mysql && npm run setup:dev && npm run dev:all
scripts.quickstart:app: npm run setup:dev && npm run dev:all
